# FanVerse-AI-Orchestrator instructions

* Continue implementation autonomously unless blocked by critical errors
* Avoid repeated confirmation requests
* Prioritize visible realtime UI progress
* Focus on hackathon demo polish over production perfection
* Use modular reusable components
* Prefer replace-style edits instead of full rewrites
* Keep architecture clean and scalable
* Use Next.js App Router and Tailwind CSS
* Use glassmorphism dark sports UI
* Add glowing LIVE indicators and smooth animations
* Use Framer Motion for realtime transitions
* Centralize mock data and services
* Simulate realtime sports events intelligently
* Build responsive layouts for desktop and mobile
* Use Gemini API only for major match moments
* Add retry handling and fallback commentary templates
* Prevent quota/rate-limit crashes gracefully
* Keep .env ignored and never expose secrets
* Use professional git commit messages:

  * feat:
  * fix:
  * ui:
  * refactor:
  * docs:
* Commit meaningful milestones automatically
* Maintain clean repository structure
* Keep README.md and TASKS.md updated
* Prioritize this execution flow:

Live Match Event
→ AI Commentary
→ Momentum Shift
→ Prediction Poll
→ Leaderboard Update
→ AI Chat Companion

* Optimize for Google Cloud Build with AI (Agentic Premier League) judging criteria:

  * multi-agent orchestration
  * realtime interaction
  * emotional engagement
  * AI-native experience
  * polished user experience
